raw.message: Enjoy £3 Whopper Wednesday and more, only when you download the BK App!

hook.summary: Text-based reveal of exclusive app-only discounts.
hook.visual_action: The text 'Offers await...' and 'Only on the BK App' slides up into view against a cream background.
hook.text_overlay: Offers await... Only on the BK App

scene_flow: Initial text reveal of 'Offers await...' with the Burger King logo.
Secondary text reveal 'Only on the BK App' completes the hook.
A smartphone slides up from the bottom showing a specific £3 Whopper Wednesday offer within the app interface.
A red 'Install Now' button appears above the phone to drive conversion.
on_screen_text: Get your Whopper fix, for just £3, EVERY WEDNESDAY.
audience_proxy: Value-conscious fast food consumers in the UK looking for exclusive mobile discounts.
